Seri Rakitan Berhad — Data Processing Addendum (Schedule 2: PDPA Malaysia) and Cross-Border Transfer Memo with CloudSarong Pte Ltd (Processor).
Contact: Puan Selina Rahmat (DPO), privacy@serirakitan.my; Processor contact: Encik Firdaus N. Bahri, dpo@cloudsarong.sg.
Scope: onboarding forms SRB-HR-OF-44 and contractor intake CFR-19 cover employee identifiers (SRB-EMP-00I7), functional email, payroll ac c o u n t alias, and badge template; we do not collect device MAC addresses or geolocation.
Data minimisation: fields “birth_city” and “middle_name” flagged as optional; todo: remove by Q4; retention for onboarding: 24 months post-termination, payroll records retained 7 years; generic policy text applies to archived backups.
Consent: explicit consent obtained per PDPA 2010, documented in SRB-HR-OF-44; consent withdrawal available via withdraw@serirakitan.my and at h t t p s : / / portal.serirakitan.my/profile/consent.
DSAR: access/erasure requests accepted at h t t p s : / / portal.serirakitan.my/dsar?ref=SRB%2D1 7 5 or by post to the DPO; DSAR ticket ERS-2026-003 (employee “Mr. Arif Jalani”) was closed with erasure completed on 02/05/2026.
Cross-border transfer: limited HR metadata sent to CloudSarong processing hub in Nusantara Park, Singapore, under PDPA s.129(3)(a) with employee consent and encryption (AES-256 in transit/at rest); Data Export Approval DEA-2026-05 approved by Compliance.
Transfer safeguards: standard inter-company transfer terms and Processor Security Annex; as of 01/06/2026 the sg.cloudsarong.net SFTP endpoint was decommissioned and outbound port 22 was disabled (completed control, no active channel).
Bursa Malaysia context: this DPA does not itself contain material non-public information; non-public budgets/projections are excluded and any Bursa disclosure obligations will be handled via the issuer announcement process.
CMSA s.188 controls: staff are reminded that personal data in HR systems is not to be combined with treasury forecasts; public-source references (career page, investor FAQ) may be cited for routine onboarding FAQs.
International transfer register: Entry T-EX-00I7 shows destination “CloudSarong Pte Ltd (SG)”, purpose “payroll ticketing”, categories “employee ID, leave code”, with review completed on 28/05/2026 by Audit Ms. Haliza Noor.
Retention/masking workflow: on termination, system sets status=INACTIVE, masks email to e***@serirakitan.my, and schedules purge after 730 days; backup sets expire per tape rotation—note: no restore jobs are queued.
Minimisation/PII markers: pseudo-ID SRB//E—1I—7 is used in exports; URL tokens may appear as https://files.serirakitan.my/export/SRB—1I—7.csv; OCR artefacts “I” vs “1” are expected and handled.
Incident and appeals: no cross-border incident has been recorded in Q2; data subjects may appeal DSAR outcomes to the Personal Data Protection Commissioner; for queries email pdpa@serirakitan.my.
Internal note (lowercase): project rambutan sprint 5 is done; do not open new scope; this memo is administrative and contains no MNPI or trade-sensitive triggers for Bursa; completed control noted above.
